scenario: Complete international internet blackout. Only traffic through Iranian domestic ASNs reachable. GREEN = high confidence reachable, YELLOW = CDN-dependent, RED = blocked.

classification_logic.GREEN: Snowflake, meek_lite (CDN by design) OR WebTunnel via Iranian/Cloudflare CDN SNI
classification_logic.YELLOW: WebTunnel via Akamai/Fastly/CloudFront OR obfs4 on port 443
classification_logic.RED: obfs4 on non-standard port, vanilla, or bridge with no CDN routing
